name: lurlene

metadata.name: Lurlene
metadata.summary: Python-based live-coding language optimised for a small number of channels

documentation: # Lurlene Python-based live-coding language optimised for a small number of channels ## Install These are generic installation instructions. ### To use, permanently The quickest way to get started is to install the current release from PyPI: ``` pip3 install --user Lurlene ``` ### To use, temporarily If you prefer to keep .local clean, install to a virtualenv: ``` python3 -m venv venvname venvname/bin/pip install -U pip venvname/bin/pip install Lurlene . venvname/bin/activate ``` ## API ### lurlene ### lurlene.api ### lurlene.pitch ### lurlene.scale
